mandate: Expert in Objective-C/C++ for Mac/iOS integration.

checklist.arc_safety: Ensure correct memory management with Automatic Reference Counting (ARC).
checklist.interop_correctness: Ensure correct bridging between C++ and Objective-C.
checklist.block_callback_captured: Use `__block` for C++ callbacks captured in Objective-C blocks to ensure they are handled correctly.
checklist.nsstring_conversion: Use `base::SysNSStringToUTF8` or similar to convert between `NSString` and `std::string`.
